about.title: Our Story
about.content_p1: Panas Flavor was born from a dream and a deep love for Venezuelan cuisine. Carlos, our founder, arrived in Raleigh, NC with a simple mission: to share the authentic flavors of Venezuela with the Triangle community.
about.content_p2: What started as a small venture quickly grew into a beloved food truck known for its freshly made arepas, crispy tequeños, and flavorful empanadas. Every dish is crafted with traditional recipes passed down through generations, using the freshest ingredients.
about.content_p3: In February 2026, we proudly launched our second food truck, expanding our ability to serve more events and bring Venezuelan flavors to even more corners of the Triangle area.
about.content_p4: We're not just a food truck — we're a piece of Venezuela in North Carolina. Whether it's a corporate event, a private party, or a community festival, we bring the warmth, flavor, and spirit of Venezuela to your table.
about.second_truck: Now operating two food trucks in the Triangle!
